name: Cold Coffee
description: Signature rich cold coffee blended with vanilla ice cream and topped with cocoa powder.

name: Peri Peri Fries
description: Crispy golden fries tossed in our signature spicy peri peri seasoning.

name: Alfredo Pasta
description: Rich and creamy penne pasta tossed in garlic parmesan white sauce with mushrooms.

name: Classic Cheese Burger
description: Juicy flame-grilled burger patty topped with cheddar cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, and chef's special burger sauce.

name: Virgin Mojito
description: Refreshing summer cooler made with fresh mint leaves, lime wedges, simple syrup, and sparkling soda.

name: Coffee & Burger Combo
description: Classic Cheese Burger paired with our signature Cold Coffee. The ultimate pick-me-up meal.

name: Pasta & Mojito Combo
description: Alfredo Pasta served with a refreshing glass of Virgin Mojito. Complete delicious lunch combo.
